q.en: When did the two Voyager spacecraft launch?
q.zh: 两艘旅行者号航天器是何时发射的？

explain.en: The book says: 'When the two Voyager spacecraft launched in 1977, they had a tough job ahead.'
explain.zh: 书中写道：'当两艘旅行者号航天器于1977年发射时，它们面临着艰巨的任务。'

q.en: What were the Voyagers' first two target planets?
q.zh: 旅行者号最初的两颗目标行星是哪两颗？

explain.en: Their mission 'was to explore Jupiter and Saturn, two giant planets in the outer solar system.'
explain.zh: 它们的任务是'探索木星和土星——太阳系外缘的两颗巨行星'。

q.en: What is recorded on the 'Golden Record' carried by each Voyager spacecraft?
q.zh: 每艘旅行者号携带的'金唱片'上记录了什么？

options.en: Music, art, spoken greetings, and sounds of nature
options.zh: 音乐、艺术、口头问候和自然界的声音

options.en: Only a map of the solar system
A list of all the planets

explain.en: The book says the record 'includes music, art, and spoken greetings from around the world. It also includes sounds from nature.'
explain.zh: 书中说唱片'包含来自世界各地的音乐、艺术和问候语，也包括自然界的声音'。

q.en: How did scientists get the Voyagers past Saturn when the rockets could only reach Jupiter?
q.zh: 当火箭只能到达木星时，科学家如何让旅行者号到达土星？

options.en: By using Jupiter's gravity to give the spacecraft a boost
options.zh: 利用木星的引力为航天器加速

options.en: By adding more fuel at launch

explain.en: Scientists 'solved that problem by using Jupiter's strong gravity to give the spacecraft a boost as it passed by.'
explain.zh: 科学家'利用木星强大的引力在航天器经过时为其加速，从而解决了这一问题'。

q.en: What did the Voyagers discover about Jupiter's Great Red Spot?
q.zh: 旅行者号关于木星的大红斑发现了什么？

options.en: It is a huge, constantly spinning storm
options.zh: 它是一场巨大、持续旋转的风暴

options.en: It is the planet's largest moon
options.zh: 它是该行星最大的卫星

explain.en: The Voyagers 'showed that the Great Red Spot was a huge, constantly spinning storm.'
explain.zh: 旅行者号'发现大红斑是一场巨大、持续旋转的风暴'。

q.en: How often does the special alignment of the four outer planets occur?
q.zh: 四颗外行星的特殊排列多久发生一次？

explain.en: The book states: 'The four planets' arrangement during the Voyager missions happens only once every 175 years!'
explain.zh: 书中写道：'旅行者任务期间四颗行星的排列每175年才发生一次！'

q.en: According to the book, which planet did Voyager 2 reach in 1989?
q.zh: 根据本书，旅行者2号于1989年抵达了哪颗行星？

explain.en: The book says Voyager 2 'reached the planet in August of 1989' after the Uranus flyby went well, referring to Neptune.
explain.zh: 书中说天王星飞越成功后，旅行者2号'于1989年8月抵达该行星'，即海王星。

q.en: Who led the committee that chose what to put on the Golden Record?
q.zh: 谁领导了挑选金唱片内容的委员会？

explain.en: The book says: 'Famous American astronomer Dr. Carl Sagan led the committee that chose what to include on each Golden Record.'
explain.zh: 书中写道：'著名美国天文学家卡尔·萨根博士领导了挑选每张金唱片内容的委员会。'

q.en: In what year did Voyager 1 enter interstellar space?
q.zh: 旅行者1号是在哪一年进入星际空间的？

explain.en: The timeline states: '2012 Voyager 1 enters interstellar space,' and the text says it left the solar system in August 2012.
explain.zh: 时间线写道：'2012年旅行者1号进入星际空间'，文中说它于2012年8月离开太阳系。

q.en: Why was the timing of the Voyager launches special?
q.zh: 旅行者号发射的时机为何特别？

options.en: The outer planets were lined up in a nearly straight line
options.zh: 外行星排成了近乎一条直线

options.en: It was during a solar eclipse
Earth was closest to the Sun

explain.en: The book says: 'In the late 1970s, the four outer planets' orbits placed them in a nearly straight line.'
explain.zh: 书中写道：'在20世纪70年代末，四颗外行星的轨道使它们排成近乎一条直线。'

prompt.en: Imagine you are a scientist choosing what to send to aliens on the Golden Record. What sounds or greetings from Earth would you include and why?
prompt.zh: 想象你是一名科学家，要在金唱片上向外星人发送信息。你会包含哪些来自地球的声音或问候，为什么？

en: Name at least two types of sounds or greetings you would include
Explain why each choice represents life on Earth
Connect your idea to the book's description of the Golden Record
zh: 至少说出两类你会包含的声音或问候
解释每种选择为何能代表地球生命
将你的想法与书中对金唱片的描述联系起来
